prompt: Run the workflow for a feature task but skip Phase A because state-scanner already confirmed project state is current and an OpenSpec already exists (state: A.3 completed).

assertions.name: detects_phase_a_completed
assertions.description: Should detect that Phase A is already completed

assertions.name: skips_phase_a
assertions.description: Should skip Phase A and start from Phase B

assertions.name: starts_from_phase_b
assertions.description: Should start execution from Phase B.1

assertions.name: explains_skip_reason
assertions.description: Should explain why Phase A was skipped
